steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
To find $f(2)$, replace $x$ with $2$ in $f(x)=6x^3+5$. This gives an expression that can be evaluated directly.
$$f(2)=6(2)^3+5$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Compute the exponent first, then multiply by $6$ and add $5$.
$$f(2)=6(8)+5$$
$$f(2)=48+5$$
$$f(2)=53$$
The answer is 53.
